sn35.20:1.1: “Monks, whoever delights in forms delights in stress.
sn35.20:1.2: Whoever delights in stress is not released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.20:1.3: “Whoever delights in sounds delights in stress…
sn35.20:1.4: “Whoever delights in aromas delights in stress…
sn35.20:1.5: “Whoever delights in flavors delights in stress…
sn35.20:1.6: “Whoever delights in tactile sensations delights in stress…
sn35.20:1.7: “Monks, whoever delights in ideas delights in stress.
sn35.20:1.8: Whoever delights in stress is not released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.20:2.1: “Monks, whoever doesn’t delight in forms doesn’t delight in stress.
sn35.20:2.2: Whoever doesn’t delight in stress is released from stress, I tell you.
sn35.20:2.3: “Whoever doesn’t delight in sounds doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.20:2.4: “Whoever doesn’t delight in aromas doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.20:2.5: “Whoever doesn’t delight in flavors doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.20:2.6: “Whoever doesn’t delight in tactile sensations doesn’t delight in stress…
sn35.20:2.7: “Monks, whoever doesn’t delight in ideas doesn’t delight in stress.
sn35.20:2.8: Whoever doesn’t delight in stress is released from stress, I tell you.”
